gateModes.admission: Every current package must have a baseline row. New package without baseline/admission row fails. Classification regression fails.
gateModes.audit: Emit report without failing on current debt.
gateModes.final: All accepted baseline debt must be removed or converted to explicit core-port/adapter-extension evidence.

purpose: Make package lib level explicit and enforceable across all package contracts.

targetLibLevel.description: The expected reusable library package owns core/domain rules plus port/public boundary. Runtime adapters are not lib authority.
